title: seed tree derive() pinned + vectors + edit-stability
manager: The seed tree — `derive(u64, label)` deterministically derives a child seed from a parent, so instance 42 of seed 1234 is a fixed coordinate reproducible forever and parallelizable trivially. The derivation is pinned with vectors and an edit-stability policy because it is an irreversible: once machines are built at these coordinates, the derivation can never change without breaking every reproduction that ever relied on it.
cs: `derive(u64,label)` = FNV-1a64 + splitmix64 round, pinned with vectors + edit-stability policy (irreversibles #11); the reproducible-coordinate tree; instance N of seed S is fixed forever.
